name: HTM International Holding Ltd.
summary: HTM International Holding Ltd. engages in the production and sale of precision molds, computer notebook accessories, hi-fi systems accessories, office automation products, and home audio products and related parts. It offers PC components, including gas injection products; PC peripherals, such as portable hard disk covers and CD boxes; and speakers. The company also provides biomass energy products. It operates in Taiwan, Europe, the United States, Japan, and China. HTM International Holding Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
